description:
The quiz assesses PostgreSQL proficiency by testing knowledge of built‑in aggregates, type casting, constraints, and various lesser‑known database features. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a supportive, instructional tone that encourages learning while providing a sense of achievement. The content is geared toward developers who want to deepen their practical Postgres skills.
Topics: PostgreSQL aggregates, Type casting, Constraints, Advanced PostgreSQL features, Database gotchas
Audience: Developers and database practitioners with basic SQL experience who want to improve their PostgreSQL expertise.
